revision.comment: Adding find params to generate optional 'find sources' capability. No change to existing transclusions; all test cases passed.
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia6]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia6]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Fixing the bad interwiki on a template
Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Expand section]]
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_section here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_section for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
<!--{{Expand section}} begin-->{{Ambox
| name  = Expand section
| type  = content
| small = {{{small|left}}}
| image = [[File:Wiki letter w cropped.svg|{{#ifeq:{{{small|}}}|no|44px|20px}}|alt=[icon]]]
| issue = This section '''needs expansion'''{{#if:{{{with|{{{for|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
 |  with: {{{with|{{{for|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{punctuation|{{{period|}}}}}}|no||.}} You can help by {{Protected page maintenance message|[{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit&section={{{section|}}}}} adding missing information]}}.{{#if: {{{find|}}} | {{br}}{{find sources mainspace|{{{find|{{ARTICLENAME}} }}} | {{{find2|}}} }}|}}
| talk  = {{{talk|{{{discuss|{{{talksection|}}}}}}}}}
| all   = All articles to be expanded
| cat   = Articles to be expanded
| date  = {{{date|}}}
}}<!--{{Expand section}} end-->
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_section for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Ambox
| name  = Expand section
| type  = content
| small = {{{small|left}}}
| image = [[File:Wiki letter w cropped.svg|{{#ifeq:{{{small|}}}|no|44px|20px}}|alt=[icon]]]
| issue = This section '''needs expansion'''{{#if:{{{with|{{{for|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
 |  with: {{{with|{{{for|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{punctuation|{{{period|}}}}}}|no||.}} You can help by {{Protected page maintenance message|[{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit&section={{{section|}}}}} adding missing information]}}.{{#if: {{{find|}}} | {{br}}{{find sources mainspace|{{{find|{{ARTICLENAME}} }}} | {{{find2|}}} }}|}}
| talk  = {{{talk|{{{discuss|{{{talksection|}}}}}}}}}
| all   = All articles to be expanded
| cat   = Articles to be expanded
| date  = {{{date|}}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}

</noinclude>
